violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
Ceiling tile in the retail area had stains from previous water damage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

Dairy products and smoothies were observed held at 45-46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

Walk-in cooler (left side) was not in good repair, ambient observed at 45F. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. TCS foods not to be stored in unit until serviced and reaches an ambient temperature of 41F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026
Ceiling tile in the retail area had stains from previous water damage. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

Food was observed held at 48-50 degrees Fahrenheit in the walk-in cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the walk-in cooler since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Walk-in cooler was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Walk-in cooler must be repaired/adjusted/replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The facility is lacking a 3-bay sink to clean the slushy machine. Per person in charge, equipment is washed in the mop sink. Establishment must install a 3-bay sink or discontinue selling slushies. Per person in charge, establishment will discontinue selling slushies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
